name: Chocolate Caramel Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare crust, combine graham cracker crumbs and margarine in a small mixing bowl.
- Press into prepared pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes; set aside.
5. In a 1 1/2-quart heavy saucepan, melt caramel candy with milk over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth.
6. Pour mixture over crust.
7. To prepare remaining filling ingredients, combine cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, egg whites, and chocolate chips.
8. Pour over crust.
9. Bake for 40 minutes.
10. Loosen cake from rim of pan.
11. Cool.
